best_candidates: Give the body one smaller, safer entry instead.

You let
the body finish its sentence instead of cutting it off mid-word.
This chapter names that reflex precisely: not as weakness, not as kindness, but as an automatic move your body makes before your mouth opens.

best_candidates: What you call boundaries is actually more like a membrane that lets everything through except your own needs.
